copy.title: Access Restricted
copy.description: Your account is signed in, but it is not allowed to use this admin workspace.
copy.note: Access is limited to approved admin accounts.

copy.title: Verify Your Identity Again
copy.description: This admin session needs a recent identity check before you can continue.
copy.note: Sensitive admin paths require a recently verified session.

copy.title: Sign-In Could Not Be Completed
copy.description: We could not verify this sign-in attempt. Start a new secure sign-in to continue.
copy.note: If you already have an account, use the same sign-in identifier you registered with.

copy.title: Set Up Two-Factor Authentication
copy.description: Your account requires two-factor authentication (2FA) to access the admin workspace. Click below to set up an authenticator app during sign-in.
copy.note: You will be redirected to sign in again. During login, you will be prompted to scan a QR code with an authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, etc.).

copy.title: Secure Handshake Failed
copy.description: We could not complete the secure sign-in handshake. Start a new sign-in attempt to continue.
copy.note: If this happens again, open a fresh browser tab and try once more.

copy.title: Too Many Attempts
copy.description: We temporarily paused sign-in because there were too many attempts. Wait a moment before trying again.
copy.note: Repeated retries can trigger additional protection on secure sign-in paths.

copy.title: Sesi Login Kedaluwarsa
copy.description: Sesi autentikasi Anda telah berakhir sebelum proses login selesai. Ini bisa terjadi jika halaman login terlalu lama tidak digunakan atau tab browser ditutup selama autentikasi.
copy.note: Sesi broker berlaku selama 1 jam. Pastikan menyelesaikan proses login sebelum waktu habis.

copy.title: Terjadi Kesalahan
copy.description: Terjadi kesalahan yang tidak terduga saat memproses permintaan autentikasi Anda. Silakan coba lagi.
copy.note: Jika masalah berlanjut, hubungi administrator sistem.
